---
title: "District Matching Diagnostics"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy comments

```{r legacy-comments, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_legacy_comments("20-match-districts-diagnose-errors.R", caption = "Legacy Chunk 20: district-matching error diagnosis")
```

```{r deviation-note, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_deviation_note("The legacy comments above diagnose unmatched rows from `merge_dfs_into_tracker()` and compare tracker alternatives. The current outputs below keep true unmatched rows, fallback source-key inventory rows, and panel-vs-join key comparisons separate so that source-key inventory is not misreported as a failed final-panel join.")
```

## Current targets-backed results

```{r summary, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_matching", "district_matching_summary.csv"), "District-matching diagnostic summary")
```

```{r legacy-reference, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_matching", "district_matching_legacy_reference.csv"), "Legacy Chunk 20 diagnostic reference")
```

```{r tracker-panel, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_matching", "district_matching_tracker_panel_comparison.csv"), "Tracker/panel/intermediate row-count comparison")
```

```{r key-comparison, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
key_comparison <- read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_matching", "district_matching_key_comparison.csv")
if (all(c("panel_key_status", "join_key_status") %in% names(key_comparison))) {
  key_summary <- as.data.frame(table(panel_key_status = key_comparison$panel_key_status, join_key_status = key_comparison$join_key_status), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  analysis_table(key_summary, "Panel-vs-join key-status summary")
} else {
  analysis_table(key_comparison, "Panel-vs-join key-status summary")
}
```

```{r source-inventory, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_matching", "district_matching_source_key_inventory.csv"), "Fallback source-key inventory separated from true unmatched rows", max_rows = 20)
```

```{r unmatched, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_matching", "district_matching_unmatched_rows.csv"), "True unmatched rows from current matching diagnostics", max_rows = 20)
```

```{r many-to-many, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "district_matching", "district_matching_many_to_many_cases.csv"), "Many-to-many cases from current matching diagnostics", max_rows = 20)
```
